'''Devil beasts''' were large flying creatures that lived on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The purple and blue [[Reptavian/Legends|reptavian]] creatures had four limbs and a tail; their large wings connected from their shoulders to their hips and covered their arms all the way to the wrist.

[[King/Legends|King]] [[Marlox]], leader of the [[Quork/Legends|Quorks]], had a devil beast whom he once threatened young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] with.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 3|''Ewoks'' (1985) 3]] {{1st}}

|es=Bestia del Diablo
